top_notes: REVIEW: near_power_dominance observed 66.53% max / 28.45% min, target max <= 65%.
Review first matchup: LONG L1_M0001 (L1_starter_instrument_fixed vs L1_starter_instrument_r1).

checks.note: Average battle duration should sit near the target playtest window.
Too many short battles suggest burst or low HP scaling issues.
Too many long battles suggest defensive scaling or low damage pressure.
Anti-stall should be rare in normal same-level matchups.
Dominance uses <= 20% power delta and excludes same-archetype mirrors.
Every configured level checkpoint should produce matchups.
Battle Lab must exercise Pocao de Vida slots before autobattler tuning.

checks.target: >= 1 consumable_use event when potion is enabled
checks.note: Potion scenarios should produce at least one battle_log_v1 consumable_use/heal sample.

checks.target: >= 1 spell behavior matchup and >= 1 disabled behavior matchup
checks.note: Battle Lab must exercise simple spell behavior before behavior-driven tuning.
Non-starter archetypes should not read as ritual-instrument-only combat once spells enter the kit.
Mental Controller should visibly pressure through spells and occult familiars, not only weapon cadence.
Elemental Mixer should show elemental spell, dot or familiar pressure in the damage mix.
Familiar Handler should have a measurable familiar contribution after pets unlock.
Summoner should produce real summon damage after superior physical rites unlock.
Dot Pressure should be readable through bleed, poison, burn or death ticks.
Funeral Burst should lean on death/fire rites once advanced physical magic unlocks.
Arena PVE tuning needs sequence-level output, not only single-duel PVP matchups.
Track 19 sanity targets: tutorial >=80%, 3 duels >=35%, 4 duels >=20%, 5/6 duels >=12%.
Arena PVE is about winning each duel; it must not become survival attrition.
